design_philosophy.visual_style: Broadcast Dark Mode with Metallic Gold Accents
principles: Data is Beautiful: Dense information must be scanable.
Gold is Reward: Use gold only for value (wins, rank, money, action).
Darkness is Stage: Backgrounds are deep charcoal to let content pop.
Motion is Live: Everything affecting the game state must animate.

variants.default: bg-primary text-primary-foreground hover:bg-primary/90 shadow-[0_0_15px_rgba(198,160,82,0.3)] uppercase font-bold tracking-wider
variants.outline: border border-primary/30 text-primary hover:bg-primary/10 hover:border-primary/60 uppercase font-bold tracking-wider
variants.glass: bg-white/5 backdrop-blur-md border border-white/10 hover:bg-white/10 text-white

Input.base: bg-background/50 border-white/10 focus:border-primary/50 focus:ring-1 focus:ring-primary/50 placeholder:text-muted-foreground/50 text-white

Navbar.style: sticky top-0 z-50 bg-background/80 backdrop-blur-lg border-b border-white/5
Navbar.mobile_bottom: fixed bottom-0 left-0 right-0 z-50 bg-[#15181C]/95 backdrop-blur-xl border-t border-white/5 pb-safe

instructions_to_main_agent: 2. UPDATE 'tailwind.config.js' with the new color palette (primary, background, card, etc.).
3. UPDATE 'index.css' to import Google Fonts (Bebas Neue, Oswald, Noto Sans) and set base styles.
4. CREATE a 'BottomNav' component for mobile navigation. It should be visible only on mobile screens.
5. REFACTOR the 'MatchCentre' to use a dense grid layout (Bento Grid Mode B) for matches.
6. APPLY the 'Gold Gradient' text effect to important numbers and rankings.
7. ENSURE all cards have a subtle border (`border-white/5`) to define edges in dark mode.
8. REPLACE all purple/blue gradients with Gold/Charcoal themes.
universal_guidelines: Do not use gradients for backgrounds unless specified.
Ensure text contrast is at least 4.5:1.
Avoid generic 'Inter' font; use 'Bebas Neue' for headings.
